capabilities.name: Product Catalog Management
capabilities.description: Publish products to the shop, organize public categories, manage product images, descriptions, tags, and visibility for public and portal users.
examples: Publish a product template and assign it to public categories
Hide a product from the shop while keeping it saleable in backend
Bulk-update website sequence for product listing order

capabilities.name: Product Variants & Combinations
capabilities.description: Configure attribute lines, attribute values, variant combinations, extra prices, and the product configurator on the e-commerce product page.
examples: Add color and size attributes to a product template
Set extra price for a specific variant combination
Disable a variant combination from the shop

capabilities.name: Pricelists & Price Rules
capabilities.description: Configure website pricelists, price rules, currency support, and per-website pricelist assignment for B2B and B2C pricing.
examples: Create a B2B pricelist with percentage discount per category
Assign a default pricelist to a website
Set a fixed price for a specific product in a pricelist

capabilities.name: Cart & Checkout Flow
capabilities.description: Manage the sale order as a shopping cart, handle add-to-cart, update quantities, address entry, billing/shipping, guest checkout, and order confirmation.
examples: Retrieve the current cart for a website visitor
Add a product variant to the cart programmatically
Configure abandoned cart recovery thresholds

capabilities.name: Payment Providers
capabilities.description: Configure payment providers, payment methods, capture modes, saved payment tokens, and transaction flow linked to e-commerce orders.
examples: Enable Stripe as a payment provider for a website
Configure authorize-then-capture for a provider
Debug a failed payment transaction on a sale order

capabilities.name: Delivery Methods & Shipping
capabilities.description: Set up delivery carriers, shipping rate rules, delivery products, and carrier-specific API integrations during checkout.
examples: Create a flat-rate delivery method
Add a delivery carrier based on destination ZIP code
Integrate live shipping rates from FedEx or UPS

capabilities.name: Wishlists & Product Comparisons
capabilities.description: Enable customer wishlists, product comparison lists, and tie them to website visitors or authenticated portal users.
examples: Enable wishlist feature on the shop
Allow product comparison by category
List a customer's wishlist products in the portal

capabilities.name: Digital Products
capabilities.description: Configure downloadable products, attachments, and digital delivery after order confirmation through the customer portal.
examples: Mark a product as digital and attach downloadable files
Restrict download links to confirmed orders
Add a digital product to a sale order line

capabilities.name: Product SEO & Shop Optimization
capabilities.description: Optimize product page metadata, URLs, sitemap inclusion, and structured data for search engines and social sharing.
examples: Set SEO title and description for a product template
Configure clean URL slugs for product pages
Verify product pages appear in the sitemap
